Name: Cavern Critters
Description: A zoo game crossed with underground base-building in a post-apocalyptic world.

Name: Digital Garden
Description: A Blazor web app where I'd like to slap my interests and logs for future reference and display.

Name: F1 Predictions
Description: An annually updated web app and Google Forms project that takes friend partcipants' answers to questions so we can rate them at the end of the year.

Name: Comissioner's Conscience
Description: A novella setting the scene in the Paxium Chronies; set before Ortwin's trilogy.

Name: Paxium Chronicles Worldbuilding
Description: Turns out building the world takes a long time. It's current private; but World Anvil has been so useful for this. Will make it public one day.

Name: Silent Seed Novel
Description: The first book in Ortwin's trilogy. Still very early in design, and won't work on it much until the novella is complete.

Name: Bleak Bloom Novel
Description: A future project, and book II in Ortwin's trilogy.

Name: Hopeful Harvest Novel
Description: A future project, and book III in Ortwin's trilogy.

Name: Search for a Star
Description: A Grads In Games competition where I (somehow) managed to win the game development competition with my entry 'Star Wrangler Arena'.

Name: Pixel Path
Description: An endless runner made as part of 'Cyberwolf Studios' with friends, intended for mobiles.

Name: Colour Climb
Description: Another mobile endless runner made with 'Cyberwolf Studios'.

Name: Unnamed Dungeon Crawler
Description: A group project during masters at university, inspired by many popular dungeon crwaler games of the time.

Name: Masters Utility Theory
Description: This was an implementation of Utility Theory AI as part of my masters course.
